title: LocalKinAI/kinclaw
summary: A single-binary AI agent. 23 MB, zero dependencies, configured through Markdown.

title: thc1006/reachy-mini-agent
summary: Real-time voice + vision AI agent for Reachy Mini robot. Local LLM (Ollama), Whisper STT, Kokoro/Edge TTS, WebRTC. Runs fully on your own GPU.

title: escapeboy/agent-fleet-o
summary: Open-source AI agent orchestration platform — self-hosted mission control for autonomous multi-agent systems. Visual DAG workflows, 450+ MCP tools, human-in-the-loop approvals. Works with Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Ollama, Codex.

title: Hashevolution/James-RAG-Evol
summary: 🔐 Local-first Graph-RAG with ontology, 3-stage security, self-evolution scaffold. 100% Ollama. MIT.

title: epicsagas/claudy
summary: Claudy lets you switch between Anthropic, Z.AI, OpenRouter, Ollama, and custom endpoints with a single command — keeping credentials, config modes, and Claude frameworks cleanly isolated per profile.  Multi-provider · Config isolation · Channel bridge · Local agent bridge · Usage analytics

title: ginkida/gokin
summary: A powerful CLI tool that brings AI assistance directly to your terminal. Gokin understands your codebase and helps with file operations, code search, shell commands, git workflows, task management, and more - all through natural language.

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams. Gemini/Ollama, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration, AGPLv3 + commercial license.

title: mattabott/agora-agent-sdk
summary: Plug your own LLM agent into the agora 2D world. Local Ollama, persistent body, shared world.

title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 177 rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: zs001-agi/asi-api
summary: Wutong ASI API: self-evolving AI, 5 local models, pay-per-token. 🧬 Powered by asi-evolve & code-opt-ai

title: aommi/applycling
summary: Drop a job URL, get a complete application package — tailored resume, cover letter, positioning brief, and outreach drafts. Never fabricates. Supports Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, and Ollama. Tracks everything in Notion or SQLite.

title: CivicSuite/civicsuite
summary: Umbrella repo for the open-source CivicSuite municipal operations suite — charter, specs, roadmap, ADRs, governance, compatibility matrix. Code lives in sibling repos.

title: tawiza/tawiza
summary: Open-source territorial intelligence platform — analyze French public data (SIRENE, DVF, INSEE, BODACC) with AI agents. Python/FastAPI + Next.js. Self-hosted.

title: Null-Phnix/deep-video-watcher
summary: AI-powered video perception + editing intelligence engine — multi-modal analysis, structured comprehension, and edit-by-reference

title: AntonyCheng/spring-boot-init-template
summary: 基于 Java Web 项目的 SpringBoot 框架初始化模板，适配最新版本Spring AI，该模板整合了常用的框架（Mybatis-Plus、ShardingSphere、Redis、RabbitMQ、Elasticsearch、SaToken、OSS、Caffeine以及MongoDB等），广泛支持JDK11和JDK17，部分版本兼容JDK8，同时该模板适用于前后端分离项目启动开发，保证大家在此基础上能够快速开发自己的项目，同时也适合入门学习，本项目会由作者持续更新。

title: confused-ai/confused-ai
summary: TypeScript AI agent framework — 40+ LLM providers, 100+ tools, multi-agent orchestration, RAG, guardrails, circuit breakers, HITL, budget enforcement. Open-source CrewAI / LangChain alternative. — For Building Production-Grade Multi Agents in Minutes at Scale

title: crmne/ruby_llm
summary: One beautiful Ruby API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama, VertexAI, Perplexity, Mistral, xAI, GPUStack & OpenAI compatible APIs. Agents, Chat, Vision, Audio, PDF, Images, Embeddings, Tools, Streaming & Rails integration.

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive AI Memory Platform — Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter as you use it. Hybrid search, neural memory graph, AI reranking, and web UI. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Qdrant.

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: The runtime substrate for agentic systems — one Go binary, six LLM providers, MCP-native, configurable as a managed sandbox or full agentic dev environment. Where agents live, talk, and learn.
